items.title: More from Mitch on the 30-point second half:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
More from Mitch on the 30-point second half:

"We got on our heels, missed some shots. You don't get as many free throws, high-percentage looks when you play on your heels like that."

items.title: Mitch Johnson on Spurs scoring just 30 after the break:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Mitch Johnson on Spurs scoring just 30 after the break: 

"We got away from what got us the 76 points in the first half just in terms of putting pressure on the rim, rolling after screens, running, continuing to find the paint, whether it's for ourselves or for our teammate."

🏆 GAME 4 FINAL SCORE 🏆

Jalen Brunson's 36 points and OG Anunoby's go-ahead tip-in with 1.2 seconds remaining secures a Game 4 win at MSG and a 3-1 series lead for the Knicks!

OG Anunoby: 33 PTS, 10-15 FGM, 7-9 3PM

Game 5: Saturday, 8:30pm/et, ABC

items.title: Final: Sparks 88, Storm 83. Natisha Hiedeman’s potential game-tying 3-pointer didn’t drop, giving Los Angeles their second straight win. Sparks are 6-6. Nneka Ogwumike had a game-high 24 points; Kelsey Plum netted 19 points, 11 assists, 4 steals. Sparks at Mercury on Saturday.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Sparks 88, Storm 83. Natisha Hiedeman’s potential game-tying 3-pointer didn’t drop, giving Los Angeles their second straight win. Sparks are 6-6. Nneka Ogwumike had a game-high 24 points; Kelsey Plum netted 19 points, 11 assists, 4 steals. Sparks at Mercury on Saturday.

items.title: The Knicks had never comeback from a 29-point deficit to win a game in the history of the franchise.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks had never comeback from a 29-point deficit to win a game in the history of the franchise.

Not in the regular season.

Not in the playoffs

And not in the NBA fucking Finals.

Until tonight.

items.title: It’s been a rough outside shooting night for Kelsey Plum. She got a clean look from 3 to ice the game but missed it, dropping her to 2-for-9 on 3s tonight. But the Sparks are holding onto that 86-83 lead with 12.1 left.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: It’s been a rough outside shooting night for Kelsey Plum. She got a clean look from 3 to ice the game but missed it, dropping her to 2-for-9 on 3s tonight. But the Sparks are holding onto that 86-83 lead with 12.1 left.

items.title: Los Angeles challenged a foul call on Dearica Hamby with 28.9 left with the Sparks nursing an 86-83 lead. The foul was overturned. No foul on Hamby and it will be Sparks ball since they had imminent possession. That is a big one.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Los Angeles challenged a foul call on Dearica Hamby with 28.9 left with the Sparks nursing an 86-83 lead. The foul was overturned. No foul on Hamby and it will be Sparks ball since they had imminent possession. That is a big one.
